name: Internal Spearphishing
description: Detects internal email with suspicious attachments or links from compromised accounts
query:
// Detect internal spearphishing attempts
// Trigger on internal emails with suspicious attachments to many recipients
events from email
where direction = "internal"
  and attachments matches "(?i)\.(exe|scr|bat|cmd|vbs|js|hta|ps1|lnk)$"
group by sender
having count(*) > 5
within 600 seconds
